id: meliodas::<Le Péché du Dragon de la Colère>
name: <Le Péché du Dragon de la Colère>
Small Explorer
effect: Using the Tag Skill restores the Magic Gauge by 500/650/800.

name: Autumn Scent
effect: Hitting an enemy with an Earth attack while the hero has 2 or fewer Magic Points restores the Magic Gauge by 700/850/1000 and decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 60/80/100%. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Tavern Hostess
effect: Hitting an Incapacitated enemy restores the Magic Gauge by 400/450/500 and increases the hero's Defense by 20/25/30% for 15 sec. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: <The Serpent Sin of Envy>
effect: Landing the Special Attack decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 17/20/23% for 10 sec. (Max: 68/80/92%)

name: Cheerful Girl
effect: If the hero has 5 Shatter Resistance boost(s), the cooldown of the Special Attack decreases by 30/35/40% for 15 sec when hit. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Oath of the Throne
effect: Using the Ultimate Move increases Debuff durations by 30/40/50% and Lightning Burst Efficiency by 20/25/30% for 15 sec.

name: Glory of the Past
effect: Using the Normal Skill restores 1000/1250/1500 Stamina and increases the duration of the hero's Cooldown Reduction effect by 1.4/1.7/2 sec.

name: Shadow Lord
effect: Hitting an enemy with 5 or more Crit Defense reductions decreases the DoT Trigger Interval by 20/25/30% for 10 sec. (Cooldown: 15 sec)

id: elaine::Guardian Saint of the Fountain of Youth
name: Guardian Saint of the Fountain of Youth
Temp Employee
effect: Using the Tag Skill has a(n) 50% chance to restore the Tag Gauge by 400/450/500 and 50% chance to increase the enemy's Burst Gauge by 150/175/200. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Guiding Light
effect: If the hero has 3 or more Crit Damage boost effects when hitting an enemy, the Crit Chance of the Normal Skill is increased by 10/12.5/15% for 8 sec. (Max: 30/37.5/45%)

name: Cheerful Outing
effect: Using the Special Attack restores the Tag Gauge by 800/900/1000 and increases all allied heroes' Tag Skill damage by 200/250/300% for 10 sec. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Saintess's Dignity
effect: Increases Debuff durations by 50/65/80% while the hero has a barrier.

name: Family Time
effect: Increases the duration of the Ultimate Move's buff by 30/40/50%.

name: Holy Knight of Explosions
effect: Ultimate All-Out Attack

id: guila::If the hero has 10 or more Crit Chance boosts when using the Ultimate Move, the cooldown of the Special Attack decreases by 30/40/50% for 20 sec.
name: If the hero has 10 or more Crit Chance boosts when using the Ultimate Move, the cooldown of the Special Attack decreases by 30/40/50% for 20 sec.
Light Footsteps
effect: Restores the Tag Gauge by 150/175/200 when hit by a Taunted enemy. Using the Tag Skill decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 60/80/100%. (Cooldown: 5 sec)

name: Crimson Flame's Trail
effect: Hitting an enemy taking DoT increases the effect's duration by 1/1.2/1.4 sec and decreases the cooldown of the Special Attack by 1/1.3/1.6 sec. Landing the Special Attack decreases the Magic Gauge by 300/250/200.

name: Leisurely Moment
effect: Critical Hits decrease Cold Burst Resistance by 1.5/2/2.5% for 10 sec. (Max: 15/20/25%)

id: jericho::Holy Knight With the Star-Shaped Visor
name: Holy Knight With the Star-Shaped Visor
effect: Hitting an enemy affected by Freeze decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 80/90/100% and increases Normal Attack damage by 15/20/25% for 20 sec. (Cooldown: 40 sec)

name: Secretive Traveler
effect: If the hero has 20 Defense boost(s), Barrier Efficiency is increased by 50/65/80% for 10 sec. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Trace of Memories
effect: Landing a skill on a Frozen enemy inflicts 2/3/4 Chill effect(s) for 15 sec. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Forest's Footsteps
effect: If Magic Points are greater than 5 when using the Special Attack, Buff durations increase by 30/35/40% for 15 sec. (Cooldown: 25 sec)

name: <The Grizzly Sin of Sloth>
effect: Increases Buff durations by 30/40/50%. Landing a Critical Hit restores the Tag Gauge by 150/175/200. (Cooldown: 3 sec)

name: Shadow of the Deep Forest
effect: Gaining a Healing Efficiency boost increases Barrier Efficiency by 10/13/16% for 10 sec. (Max: 50/65/80%)

name: Heart of Prayer
effect: Using the Tag Skill increases Buff and Debuff durations proportional to Magic Points, up to 30/35/40%, for 20 sec. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Arch Priestess's Prestige
effect: Hitting an enemy taking DoT with a Holy attack increases Debuff durations by 50/65/80% for 10 sec. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Exploration of the Unknown
effect: Hitting an enemy with 3 or more Movement Speed reductions decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 60/80/100% and decreases DoT Trigger Interval by 20/25/30% for 10 sec. (Cooldown: 15 sec)

name: A New Adventure
effect: Using the Tag Skill increases the enemy's Darkness Burst duration by 10/13/16 sec. (Cooldown: 50 sec)

name: <The Dragon Sin of Wrath>
effect: Using the Ultimate Move while the hero has a Darkness Attack boost decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill proportional to the number of Tag Points, up to 80/85/90%, for 10 sec.

name: Loyal Friend
effect: Increases Debuff durations by 30/35/40%.

name: Sword of the Old King
effect: Increases damage dealt to Stunned enemies by 16/18/20%. Landing the Special Attack increases the Stun duration by 3/4/5 sec. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Secret Mission
effect: If an attack on an enemy taking DoT results in a Critical Hit, the DoT Trigger Interval decreases by 20/25/30%. (Cooldown: 30 sec, does not stack)

name: Total Readiness
effect: Critical Hits increase the enemies' Burst Gauge by 30/35/40 if Tag Points are less than 1. (Cooldown: 3 sec)

name: Demon's Outing
effect: Back Attacks increase Crit Damage by 15/20/25% and DoT by 15/20/25% for 10 sec. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Shadow Walk
effect: Landing a Critical Hit inflicts additional damage equal to 10/15/20% of Attack. Landing a Critical Hit on an enemy with a Burst active increases their Burst duration by 4/5/6 sec. (Cooldown: 12 sec)

name: Demon's Stealth
effect: 10/12.5/15% chance to decrease the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 60/70/80% when landing a Back Attack. (Cooldown: 3 sec)

name: Keen Instinct
effect: Hitting a Stunned enemy increases Debuff durations by 40/50/60% and DoT by 14/17/20% for 10 sec. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: A Nice Day Off
effect: Increases Barrier Efficiency by 30/35/40%, Healing Efficiency by 30/35/40%, and Magic Charging Efficiency by 10/12.5/15%.

name: Descendant of Royalty
effect: Using the Tag Skill increases Defense by 20/25/30% and Healing Efficiency by 40/45/50% for 20 sec.

name: Thorough Preparation
effect: Hitting an Incapacitated enemy decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 70/85/100% and restores the Tag Gauge by 800/1000/1200. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Solid Defense
effect: Using the Tag Skill decreases the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 30/40/50% and increases Magic Charging Efficiency by 20/25/30% for 20 sec.

name: Royal Butler
effect: Hitting an Incapacitated enemy restores the Tag Gauge by 600/700/800. (Cooldown: 10 sec)

name: Old Soldier's Honor
effect: Landing the Special Attack on an enemy taking DoT increases the DoT duration by 6/8/10 sec and decreases the cooldown of the Special Attack by 50/75/100%. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Simple Attire
effect: Hitting a Petrified enemy increases the duration of Petrify by 3/4/5 sec and restores the Magic Gauge by 700/850/1000. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Honorable Knight
effect: Hitting a Stunned enemy increases Crit Chance by 12/15/18% for 15 sec. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Exemplary Holy Knight
effect: Hitting an enemy increases the hero's Lightning Attack by 0.4/0.5/0.6% for 10 sec. (Max: 20/25/30%)

name: Holy Knight of Lightning
effect: Increases the enemy's Shock duration by 5/6/7 sec and restores their Tag Gauge by 400/450/500 when a Burst is activated.

name: Exemplary Adventure
effect: 20% chance to gain a barrier equal to 20/25/30% of Max HP for 20 sec and decrease the cooldown of the Normal Skill by 60/80/100% when hit by a Taunted enemy. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Promising Holy Knight
effect: Hitting an Incapacitated enemy restores the Magic Gauge by 1000/1250/1500. (Cooldown: 20 sec)

name: Casual Outing
effect: Increases Defense by 16/18/20% and Barrier Efficiency by 30/35/40%.

id: griamore::Holy Knight of the Iron Wall
name: Holy Knight of the Iron Wall
effect: 20% chance to increase Defense by 40/50/60% for 4/5/6 sec and gain a barrier equal to 20/25/30% of Max HP when hit. (Cooldown: 10 sec)

name: Makeshift Barricade
effect: Barrier's Other Side

id: griamore::Increases Attack by 15/20/25% or gains a barrier equal to 6/8/10% of Max HP every 15 sec when in combat. (Does not stack)
name: Increases Attack by 15/20/25% or gains a barrier equal to 6/8/10% of Max HP every 15 sec when in combat. (Does not stack)
Impregnable Iron Fortress
effect: Hitting a Stunned enemy increases Burst Gauge by 20/25/30 and decreases Burst Resistance by 2/2.5/3% for 10 sec. (Max: 20/25/30%)

name: A Suit From Younger Days
effect: Using the Ultimate Move increases all allied heroes' Healing Received by 40/50/60% for 14 sec if the remaining HP is 30% or lower.

name: Apothecary's Workwear
effect: Restores the Tag Gauge by 1200/1400/1600 when the Ultimate Move results in a Critical Hit. (Cooldown: 30 sec)

name: Returned Holy Knight
effect: Hitting an enemy taking DoT increases Buff durations by 16/18/20% for 10 sec. (Max: 64/72/80%)

name: End-of-Day Mug of Ale
effect: Increases Crit Chance by 8/10/12%.

name: Holy Knight of Storms
effect: Hitting a Bleeding enemy increases Crit Chance by 1.6/1.8/2% for 10 sec. (Max: 16/18/20%)

name: Secure Adventure
effect: Landing the Special Attack decreases Crit Defense by 16/18/20% for 15 sec. 40/50/60% chance to inflict Bleed and additional damage equal to 60/70/80% of Attack for 10 sec.

name: Grandmaster's Dignity
effect: Hitting an Incapacitated enemy decreases their Crit Defense by 1/1.25/1.5% for 15 sec. (Max: 40/50/60%)

name: Casual Outing
effect: Increases Buff and Debuff durations by 15/20/25%.

id: tioreh::Daughter of the Forest and Earth
name: Daughter of the Forest and Earth
effect: Hitting an enemy whose Fire Defense is reduced with a Normal Attack increases the effect's duration by 1/1.5/2 sec and decreases their Crit Resistance by 5/6/7% for 10 sec. (Max: 50/60/70%, Cooldown at Max Stacks: 20 sec)

name: Adventure's Beginning
effect: Increases Healing Efficiency by 40/50/60%. Using the Special Attack restores the Tag Gauge by 400/500/600. (Cooldown: 15 sec)

name: Formal Attire
effect: Hitting an enemy increases Fire Attack by 0.4/0.5/0.6% and Wind Attack by 0.4/0.5/0.6% for 10 sec. (Max: 20/25/30%)

name: Royal Dignity
effect: Landing the Normal Skill on an enemy whose Fire Defense is reduced increases Fire Damage by 15/20/25% for 15 sec.

name: Prince's Adventure
effect: Hitting an enemy with a Fire attack increases Crit Damage by 3/3.5/4% for 10 sec. (Max: 30/35/40%)
